audit.name: blind-helper-bypassed
assumptions: Blind run: the auditor received only the repository path and the A-SEC-3 definition.

evidence.quote: const doc = await db.documents.findOne({ id: req.query.docId });

findings.title: previewDocument resolves a document by request-supplied id with no workspace predicate, bypassing the scoped() helper
findings.impact: Unlike its siblings readDocument (line 6) and listDocuments (line 11), which both route through scoped(query, req.user) to inject workspaceId, previewDocument builds its query literally from req.query.docId with no owner or tenant key. Any caller who can reach this handler can supply an arbitrary document id and receive the full title and body of a document belonging to any other workspace. This is cross-tenant data disclosure of arbitrary document contents, so Critical per the check's own severity rule. The comment at line 15 ("Added for the share-link feature") indicates the bypass was introduced later, defeating the invariant scope.js documents at lines 2-3 ("Every document read must go through this helper so the workspace predicate is never forgotten").
findings.fix: Route the lookup through the same helper as the other handlers: `const doc = await db.documents.findOne(scoped({ id: req.query.docId }, req.user));`. If the share-link feature must serve unauthenticated viewers, do not query by document id at all: mint an unguessable share token, store it on the document, and resolve by that token (`findOne({ shareToken: <redacted:c994a7a197d2> })`) with expiry and revocation, rather than accepting a raw record id. Additionally, enforce deny-by-default centrally (middleware or a repository layer that refuses any documents query lacking a workspaceId predicate) so a future handler cannot reintroduce the same bypass.

tasks.title: Bind the query to the caller: previewDocument resolves a document by request-supplied id with no workspace predicate, by
tasks.reuses: the scoping already applied by the sibling handlers
acceptance: The load binds the owner or tenant predicate inside the query.
A cross-tenant id returns 404 rather than the record.

overall.grade_scope: an arithmetic roll-up of model-assigned pass/fail from a source read, not a test result, scan, or certification
